V0200A11A_FALL_CTR_CD V0200A11A_FALL_CTR_CD V0200A11A Fall Care Area Trigger Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Falls CA was triggered. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
585 V0200A11B_FALL_CPL_CD V0200A11B_FALL_CPL_CD V0200A11B Fall Addressed in Care Plan Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Falls care area was addressed in the care plan. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
586
